$description: Kiva Ecosystem 2026 design tokens — full export of the Figma variable library (Global primitives, Alias semantic layer, Mapped component layer). Aliases use {Collection::token/path} references. Multi-mode values are arrays aligned with the collection's modes array; single values apply to every mode. COLOR values are hex (8-digit = alpha). FLOAT dimension values are px.

spacing/button/inset-vertical.$note: Legacy: serves the 2024 reference button sets only; canonical buttons use 8px vertical padding + fixed heights.

button/color/background/disabled.$note: Component-level disabled treatment additionally applies 40% opacity (code: tw-opacity-low = 30%).

button/inset/lg.$note: Legacy (2024 reference sets). Canonical geometry: default 24px horizontal x 8px vertical padding, fixed 48px height; small 16x4, fixed 32px height.

tooltip/color/background/dark.$note: Theme-independent by design: tooltips are functional surfaces and must look identical across themed sections. Dark chip = for light surfaces. Darkest gray (gray/800) rather than pure black avoids halation on small copy.

tooltip/color/background/light.$note: Light chip = for dark or photographic surfaces.
